book.title: The Mountain Is You
book.author: Brianna Wiest
book.description: This is a book about self-sabotage. Why we do it, when we do it, and how to stop doing it—for good. Coexisting but conflicting needs create self-sabotaging behaviors. This is why we resist efforts to change, often until they feel completely futile. But by extracting crucial insight from our most damaging habits, building emotional intelligence by better understanding our brains and bodies, releasing past experiences at a cellular level, and learning to act as our highest potential future selves, we can step out of our own way and into our potential. For centuries, the mountain has been used as a metaphor for the big challenges we face, especially ones that seem impossible to overcome. To scale our mountains, we actually have to do the deep internal work of excavating trauma, building resilience, and adjusting how we show up for the climb. In the end, it is not the mountain we master, but ourselves.

book.title: Atomic Habits
book.author: James Clear
book.description: No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving—every day. James Clear, one of the world's leading experts on habit formation, reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

book.title: The Psychology Of Money
book.author: Morgan Housel
book.description: Doing well with money isn’t necessarily about what you know. It’s about how you behave. And behavior is hard to teach, even to really smart people. In The Psychology of Money, award-winning author Morgan Housel shares 19 short stories exploring the different ways people think about money and teaches you how to make better sense of one of life’s most important topics.

book.title: The Let Them Theory
book.author: Mel Robbins
book.description: If you've ever felt stuck, overwhelmed, or frustrated with where you are, the problem isn't you. The problem is the power you give to other people. Two simple words—Let Them—will set you free. Free from the opinions, drama, and judgments of others. Free from the exhausting cycle of trying to manage everything and everyone around you. The Let Them Theory puts the power to create a life you love back in your hands—and this book will show you exactly how to do it.

book.title: The Subtle Art Of Not Giving A F*ck
book.author: Mark Manson
book.description: There are only so many things we can give a f*k about so we need to figure out which ones really matter, Manson makes clear. While money is nice, caring about what you do with your life is better, because true wealth is about experience. A much-needed grab-you-by-the-shoulders-and-look-you-in-the-eye moment of real-talk, filled with entertaining stories and profane, ruthless humor, The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*k is a refreshing slap for a generation to help them lead contented, grounded lives.

book.title: Ikigai
book.author: Héctor García and Francesc Miralles
book.description: According to the Japanese, everyone has an ikigai—a reason for living. And according to the residents of the Japanese village with the world’s longest-living people, finding it is the key to a happier and longer life. Having a strong sense of ikigai—where what you love, what you’re good at, what you can get paid for, and what the world needs all overlap—means that each day is infused with meaning. It’s the reason we get up in the morning. It’s also the reason many Japanese never really retire: they remain active and work at what they enjoy, because they’ve found a real purpose in life.

book.title: Everything Is F*cked
book.author: Mark Manson
book.description: In Everything Is F*cked, Manson turns his gaze from the inevitable flaws within each individual self to the endless calamities taking place in the world around us. Drawing from psychological research and philosophy, he examines faith, happiness, freedom, hope, money, entertainment, and the internet.

book.title: The Silent Patient
book.author: Alex Michaelides
book.description: Theo Faber is a criminal psychotherapist who has waited a long time for the opportunity to work with Alicia. His determination to get her to talk and unravel the mystery of why she shot her husband takes him down a twisting path into his own motivations—a search for the truth that threatens to consume him.

book.title: A Good Girl's Guide To Murder
book.author: Holly Jackson
book.description: The case is closed. Five years ago, schoolgirl Andie Bell was murdered by Sal Singh. The police know he did it. Everyone in town knows he did it. But Pippa Fitz-Amobi isn't so sure. When she chooses the case as the topic for her final project, she starts to uncover secrets that someone in town desperately wants to stay hidden.

book.title: Good Girl, Bad Blood
book.author: Holly Jackson
book.description: Pip is not a detective anymore. Yet when someone she knows goes missing, she has to break that promise. Jamie Reynolds has disappeared, and the police won't do anything about it. Pip uncovers more of her town's dark secrets, and this time everyone is listening.

book.title: One Of Us Is Lying
book.author: Karen M. McManus
book.description: Five students walk into detention. Only four walk out alive. Simon, the creator of Bayview High's notorious gossip app, dies before the end of detention, and all four classmates become suspects in his murder. Everyone has secrets. What matters is how far you would go to protect them.

book.title: We Were Liars
book.author: E. Lockhart
book.description: A beautiful and distinguished family. A private island. A brilliant, damaged girl. A group of four friends—the Liars—whose friendship turns destructive. A secret. Lies upon lies. True love. The truth.

book.title: Fearless
book.author: Lauren Roberts
book.description: With a decision looming, Paedyn battles between her head, her heart, and the hidden trials she now faces. Through it all, Kai Azer fights to call her his, even if it means defying his king. Are vows strong enough to unite a kingdom? Or will betrayal break them?

book.title: Powerless
book.author: Lauren Roberts
book.description: Surviving in the slums as an Ordinary is no simple task. Paedyn poses as a Psychic to stay alive, but when she saves one of Ilya's princes, she is thrown into the Purging Trials—a brutal competition meant for the Elites whose powers she does not possess.

book.title: Reckless
book.author: Lauren Roberts
book.description: The kingdom of Ilya is in turmoil. After surviving the Purging Trials, Paedyn Gray has killed the King and started a Resistance. Now she is running from Kai Azer, who has vowed to find her and bring her to justice, even though duty and desire are at war within him.

book.title: The Cruel Prince
book.author: Holly Black
book.description: Jude was seven when her parents were murdered and she and her sisters were taken to live in the High Court of Faerie. Ten years later, she wants nothing more than to belong there, even though she is mortal. To win a place at court, she must defy Prince Cardan and face the consequences.

book.title: Onyx Storm
book.author: Rebecca Yarros
book.description: After nearly eighteen months at Basgiath War College, Violet Sorrengail knows there is no more time for lessons. She must journey beyond the failing wards to seek allies from unfamiliar lands and uncover a truth that may save everything she loves.

book.title: Fourth Wing
book.author: Rebecca Yarros
book.description: Enter the brutal and elite world of a war college for dragon riders. Violet Sorrengail was supposed to live a quiet life among books, but instead must compete in a deadly Riders Quadrant where dragons, enemies, and secrets threaten her survival every day.

book.title: The Wicked King
book.author: Holly Black
book.description: After the revelation that Oak is the heir to Faerie, Jude must keep her brother safe while controlling the wicked king, Cardan. But the politics of Faerie are dangerous, and betrayal threatens everything she loves.

book.title: The Queen Of Nothing
book.author: Holly Black
book.description: Jude, now the exiled mortal Queen of Faerie, is powerless after Cardan's betrayal. When opportunity arrives, she risks venturing back into Elfhame, where war is brewing and she must choose between her ambition and her humanity.

book.title: A Touch of Darkness
book.author: Scarlett St. Clair
book.description: Persephone is the Goddess of Spring by title only. After moving to New Athens, she hopes to live quietly as a mortal journalist. But after a chance encounter with Hades, she is forced into a contract that may cost her freedom—and her heart.

book.title: Twisted Love
book.author: Ana Huang
book.description: Alex Volkov has a heart of ice, but when he is forced to look after his best friend's sister, Ava Chen, he begins to feel something dangerous. Their forbidden romance unleashes secrets that could destroy them both.

book.title: Twisted Lies
book.author: Ana Huang
book.description: Christian Harper is charming, deadly, and smart enough to hide it. Stella Alonso is sweet, shy, and guarded. When a threat from her past pushes her toward him, a dangerous arrangement grows into something far more intense.

book.title: King of Wrath
book.author: Ana Huang
book.description: Dante Russo thrives on control, but blackmail forces him into an engagement with Vivian Lau. He plans to destroy the arrangement, but keeping his distance becomes harder when desire and duty collide.

book.title: King Of Greed
book.author: Ana Huang
book.description: Dominic Davenport built an empire but drove away the only person who loved him for himself. Alessandra Davenport finally chooses herself, and Dominic must fight for the marriage he nearly destroyed.

book.title: The Fine Print
book.author: Lauren Asher
book.description: Rowan Kane is in the business of creating fairy tales, but hiring Zahra for Dreamland changes everything. Their professional arrangement spirals into something personal, and secrets threaten the possibility of a happy ending.

book.title: Love Redesigned
book.author: Lauren Asher
book.description: Julian Lopez and Dahlia Muñoz are childhood rivals forced into a renovation project together. Their temporary truce grows complicated as old emotions and undeniable attraction return.

book.title: Terms and Conditions
book.author: Lauren Asher
book.description: Declan needs a wife to fulfill his grandfather's inheritance clause, and his assistant Iris offers the perfect fake solution. But when their contract starts to feel real, both risk getting hurt.

book.title: Hunting Adeline
book.author: H.D. Carlton
book.description: The Diamond Death walks alongside me, but the reaper is no match for me. Trapped in a world of monsters, Adeline fights to survive while the predator who hunts her tears apart the world to find her.

book.title: Haunting Adeline
book.author: H.D. Carlton
book.description: The Manipulator can bend emotions. The Shadow cannot stay away. Their obsession grows darker and more dangerous as desire, fear, and possession become impossible to separate.

book.title: God of Malice
book.author: Rina Kent
book.description: I caught the attention of a monster. Killian Carson is cold-blooded, manipulative, and savage, and once he sees me, escape becomes impossible.

book.title: God of Pain
book.author: Rina Kent
book.description: Annika Volkov longed for the wrong man. Creighton King is silent, dangerous, and emotionally unreachable, but their conflict awakens something destructive in them both.

book.title: God of Wrath
book.author: Rina Kent
book.description: When Cecily Knight sneaks into the Heathen Club on behalf of a rival gang, she catches the eye of Jeremy Volkov, the ruthless heir to the Russian Bratva, who wants to claim her for himself.

book.title: The Sweetest Oblivion
book.author: Danielle Lori
book.description: Elena Abelli is a romantic at heart living in the mafia underworld. When her sister is arranged to marry Nicolas Russo, Elena finds herself drawn to the one man she should never want.

book.title: The Maddest Obsession
book.author: Danielle Lori
book.description: Gianna wears chaos like glitter, while Christian Allister is cold order personified. Their lives intertwine over years of rivalry, fascination, and attraction neither can control.

book.title: The Sinner
book.author: Shantel Tessier
book.description: Raised in a world of money and secret power, she falls for Easton Bradley Sinnett—Sin—a man whose darkness wrecks her in the worst way, yet she cannot stop craving him.

book.title: Priest
book.author: Sierra Simone
book.description: Tyler Bell has followed every rule of priesthood until Poppy Danforth enters his confessional and his forbidden thoughts become impossible to silence.

book.title: The Hybrid Prince
book.author: Tui T. Sutherland
book.description: In The Hybrid Prince, MudWing siblings Umber and Sora flee Jade Mountain Academy after an explosion set by Sora kills two students. They fly across desolate islands trying to survive and escape the consequences.

book.title: Escaping Peril
book.author: Tui T. Sutherland
book.description: Peril, a dragon known for her deadly firescales, must stop Queen Scarlet from threatening Jade Mountain Academy while questioning her own loyalty and worth.

book.title: Better Than A Touchdown
book.author: Jalen Hurts
book.description: From Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts comes an empowering story about friendship, community, and the power of teamwork. Jalen is excited for the new school year because he finally gets to try out for the football team.

book.title: The Adventures Of Tubby Nugget
book.author: Jenine Pastores and Josh Jackson
book.description: Tubby refuses the dunking ceremony, a tradition on Planet Nüg that turns small nugs into serious adults, choosing instead a fun, creative life full of imagination.

book.title: Mother Bruce
book.author: Ryan T. Higgins
book.description: Bruce the bear likes to keep to himself and eat eggs. But when his hard-boiled goose eggs hatch into goslings who think he is their mother, everything changes.
